persona.title: Persona
examples: Sarah, B2B SaaS Senior PM, late 30s, parent of two
James, junior engineer at a Series A startup, first job
Mei, solo product designer freelancing for SaaS founders

think-and-feel.title: Think & Feel
examples: Worries we'll miss the launch window for Q3
Wishes the data team treated her as a partner, not a ticket queue
Quietly proud of last quarter's NPS lift

see.title: See
examples: Slack channels lighting up with bug reports every morning
Competitors shipping AI features faster than her team
Roadmap deck from the CEO with three new bets

hear.title: Hear
hear.prompt: What do they hear from others?
examples: CEO saying "we need to move faster on AI"
Engineers saying the legacy stack is slowing everything down
Lenny's Newsletter podcast on her commute

say-and-do.title: Say & Do
say-and-do.prompt: How do they show up in public?
examples: Tells the team "we'll figure it out" in standups
Pushes back hard on scope creep in roadmap reviews
Posts on LinkedIn about "customer obsession"

pain.title: Pain
examples: Spends 4 hours a week reconciling spreadsheets manually
Afraid the next reorg will eliminate her role
Can't get reliable answers out of the data warehouse

gain.title: Gain
examples: Ships one zero-to-one feature with measurable adoption
Stops being the bottleneck for cross-team launches
Gets invited to the strategic planning offsite
